name: UV Shield Aviator Sunglasses
description: Premium polarized aviator sunglasses with 100% UV400 protection. Lightweight titanium frame perfect for beach days and outdoor adventures.

name: Breezy Linen Beach Dress
description: Flowy linen blend beach dress with tropical print. Breathable and stylish — wear it from the beach to the boardwalk.

name: SPF 50+ Mineral Sunscreen
description: Reef-safe mineral sunscreen with SPF 50+. Lightweight, non-greasy formula with Zinc Oxide for all-day sun protection.

name: Woven Straw Sun Hat
description: Wide-brim woven straw hat with adjustable inner band. Provides excellent shade and adds effortless summer style.

name: Reef Explorer Sandals
description: Water-resistant sandals with quick-dry straps and non-slip soles. Perfect for beach walks, reef exploring, and city strolling.

name: Inflatable Beach Soap
description: Portable insulated cooler bag with inflatable walls for maximum cold retention. Holds 20 cans — keep drinks cold all day at the beach.
